mapper.sql: sku_id, total_stock, available_stock, locked_stock, sold_stock, version, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_inventory ( sku_id, total_stock, available_stock, locked_stock, sold_stock, version, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{skuId}, #{totalStock}, #{availableStock}, #{lockedStock}, #{soldStock}, #{version}, COALESCE(#{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3)) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_stock = VALUES(total_stock), available_stock = VALUES(available_stock), locked_stock = VALUES(locked_stock), sold_stock = VALUES(sold_stock), version = VALUES(version), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_inventory SET locked_stock = locked_stock - #{quantity}, sold_stock = sold_stock + #{quantity}, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE sku_id = #{skuId} AND locked_stock >= #{quantity}

UPDATE ticket_inventory SET available_stock = available_stock + #{quantity}, locked_stock = locked_stock - #{quantity}, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE sku_id = #{skuId} AND locked_stock >= #{quantity}
